sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58618" key="kollopw/lhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολλοπώλης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κόλλα</etym>) <sense id="n58618.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dealer in glue</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:183" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.183</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
